name: Modified N-free Hoagland solution + 20 mM glucose, no iron plaque (control, CK) (PMC13134045)
description: Modified N-free Hoagland solution + 20 mM glucose, no iron plaque (control, CK) — medium reported in PMC13134045, extracted for GrowthDB and mapped to BiGG.

provenance.citation: Medium composition from PMC13134045 (see GrowthDB record).
provenance.notes: Composition mapped to BiGG (mapper + salt dissociation); presence-based bounds; paper_amount retained. Added via GrowthDB curation.
provenance.verification: paper-verified (complete recipe; cited + supplementary sources chased)
provenance.verification_evidence: filter-sterilized glucose was added to each microcosm to achieve a final concentration of 20 mM, simulating root exudates
provenance.base_medium: Modified nitrogen-free Hoagland solution (Hoagland & Arnon 1950), pH 6.0, N-omitted, + 20 mM glucose; anoxic (N2-sparged)

sources_chased.what: Paper main text (Materials and Methods, microcosm setup) — full-text JATS XML
added: N-free salt substitutions CaCl2.2H2O, KH2PO4, K2SO4
removed erroneous NH4+ and NO3- (N was deliberately omitted)

sources_chased.what: Reference 36 (Liu et al. 2019, Soil Biol Biochem) cited for IRRI nutrient solution used to raise seedlings
added: confirmed ref 36 is the seedling IRRI solution, NOT the microcosm Hoagland base recipe; no Hoagland recipe cited

sources_chased.what: Canonical Hoagland solution composition (Hoagland & Arnon 1950) to expand the named base medium
Supplementary files (wrag088_Supplemental_Files); Tables S1 (soil properties), S2 (fermentation products)
sources_chased.how: identified supplementary section in XML — no media recipe table present (S1=soil physicochemistry, S2=metabolites)
added: confirmed no full media-recipe table exists in the supplement

missing_before: Dinitrogen (N2) as the nitrogen source / gas phase
recuration.notes: The current record wrongly listed Ammonium (nh4) and Nitrate (no3) as components: the paper explicitly OMITTED all nitrogen (this is the N-free nitrogen-fixation control), replacing the three N-salts with CaCl2.2H2O, KH2PO4 and K2SO4 — both were removed. The paper names 'modified N-free Hoagland solution' but cites no Hoagland recipe and gives no trace-element/Mg list, so the base macro/micronutrient salts (Mg, B, Mn, Zn, Cu, Mo, Fe chelate) were expanded from the canonical Hoagland & Arnon (1950) formulation; the exact Hoagland strength used, and whether iron was retained in this no-plaque co

components.role: calcium / chloride salt (N-free replacement of Ca(NO3)2.4H2O)
